title: Add hypernetwork approach and issue #140 analysis summary

data.description: A shared-trunk MLP generates full GPT weights from compact conditioning vectors.

novel_contributions: Issue #140 summary with 7 markdown files covering leaderboard, core and advanced techniques, negative results, untried ideas, tier analysis, and technique lineage.
Hypernetwork prototype that generates full GPT weights from compact conditioning vectors.
Reported 9.34x compression from 2.8M hypernetwork parameters to 26.5M target parameters.
